particulars.description: The freehold land known as unit C1 boulevard industrial estate, beacon road, beeston, nottingham registered under title number: 259355; and. The freehold property known as abbey trade park, hermitage lane, mansfield registered under title number: NT206511.

F/H property k/a unit C1 boulevard industrial estate, beacon road, beeston, nottingham t/no NT259355. Fixed charge all buildings and other structures fixed to the property fixed charge any goodwill relating to the property fixed charge all plant machinery and other items affixed to the property assignment of the rental sums together with the benefit of all rights and remedies fixed charge the proceeds of any claim made under insurance policy relating to the property floating charge all unattached plant machinery chattels and goods on or in or used in connection with the property or the business or undertaking at the property.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee on any account whatsoever
